title: Phantom Blades
description:
[gold]Shivs[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you play each turn deals [blue]9[/blue] additional damage.
smart_description:
[gold]Shivs[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
The first [gold]Shiv[/gold] you play each turn deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
notes: Grants Retain to all Shiv cards in hand. Increases damage of the first Shiv played each turn by the power's Amount (9). The Counter stack type tracks related game state.
